title: QuestionProxyRequest
description: Request body sent by the gateway when a question needs proxying.

id.description: Gateway-generated UUID used as an idempotency key.

provider.description: Provider that originated the question (always "opencode" for now).

custom.description: If true (default), a free-text "Type your own answer" input is shown.

header.description: Short label (≤30 chars) shown as the tab/step heading.

multiple.description: If true, multiple options may be selected simultaneously.

QuestionOption.description: A single selectable option within a question.

SessionId.description:
Opaque session identifier.

Wraps a `String` with `#[serde(transparent)]` so the JSON wire format
stays a bare string — no migration needed for TypeScript plugins, shell
scripts, or persisted state files.
